# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent kong plugin misconfiguration.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    service: 
      name: my_service
    config:
      origins: 
        - "https://example.com"
        - "https://another-example.com"
      methods: 
        - "GET"
        - "POST"
        - "OPTIONS"
      headers: 
        - "Authorization"
        - "Content-Type"
        - "Accept"
      expose_headers: 
        - "X-Custom-Header"
      max_age: 3600
      credentials: true

  - name: key-auth
    service: 
      name: my_service
    config:
      key_in_body: false
      hide_credentials: true

  - name: rate-limiting
    service: 
      name: my_service
    config:
      second: 5
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
      policy: "local"

services:
  - name: my_service
    url: "https://api.myservice.com"
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting

routes:
  - name: my_route
    service: 
      name: my_service
    paths:
      - "/api/v1/resource"
    plugins:
      - name: cors
      - name: key-auth
      - name: rate-limiting
